## Vulnerability Description
A clear description of the security issue.

## Impact
What systems/data could be affected?

## Reproduction Steps
Steps to demonstrate the vulnerability.

## Suggested Fix
If you have recommendations for how to address the issue.

## Disclosure
I understand this will be handled under the project's security policy.
